plan.title: Profile settings save race
plan.objective: Prevent stale save responses from overwriting newer settings and verify the fix
constraints: Preserve the existing save API contract
Keep optimistic success feedback for the newest request

tasks.summary: Confirm how concurrent save requests can resolve out of order
tasks.outcome: Older requests can still commit state after a newer submission resolves.

tasks.summary: Ignore stale save responses and keep the newest request authoritative
acceptance_criteria: Submitting profile changes twice quickly leaves the latest values in state
Loading and success UI still resolve correctly for the newest request

tasks.summary: Run targeted frontend verification for profile save behavior
acceptance_criteria: Relevant smoke or build checks pass
